what_was_requested: Execute ETAP 3: cf_relative_volume standalone workflow — validate, publish, build, clone snapshot, backtest, and record results for the volume intensity anomaly feature.
what_was_done: Step 1 (s3_validate_feature) was attempted. The first validate call returned an error: the custom feature code used 'def compute(ctx)' but the system requires 'def compute_series(ctx)' or 'compute_feature(step)'. The code was corrected to use 'def compute_series(ctx)' with the same logic (volume / rolling(96).mean()). However, the corrected validate call timed out with MCP error -32001. Subsequent health check and retry attempts confirmed the entire MCP dev_space1 session has dropped — all tools returned 'not found in registry'. Before the dropout, successfully retrieved the snapshot list showing 'active-signal-v1' (baseline, version 1) is available for cloning. No further steps could be executed due to complete MCP session loss.
error: MCP dev_space1 session dropped completely after step 1 attempt. First validate call returned 'Custom feature code must define a top-level compute_series(ctx) or compute_feature(step) function.' — code was corrected but subsequent call timed out. All dev_space1 tools then returned 'not found in registry'. Per workflow rule 7: 'do NOT retry the same call — the MCP session is corrupted.'
